title: WordPress Developer
description:
iTool Solutions is seeking a full-time Web Developer/Designer. An ideal candidate must have at least 2 years of experience.
  
  
Qualification: Bachelor's degree  
Experience: 2+ Years  
Job Location: Surat  
  
Basic Skills:  
i. Good communication and interpersonal skills  
ii. 2+ years of experience working with WordPress.  
iii. Having experience with other CMS like Joomla, Shopify  
iv. Strong knowledge of current web development languages (including HTML5, CSS3, PHP/MySQL)  
v. Familiarity with web standards and usability  
vi. Ability to manage multiple projects at a time  
vii. Flexibility and eagerness to identify, learn, and use new and changing technologies  
viii. Familiarity with ASP .net, Javascript/VBScript, web server configurations (Windows and Linux) a plus  
ix. Self-motivated with “Go Get It attitude”  
  
Responsibility:  
i. Design and implement websites from initial concept, site architecture, and user interface to finished deliverable  
ii. Code and implement WordPress sites from Photoshop layout through Html/CSS to a custom theme, functions, and plugins  
iii. Design and implement new features, enhancements, and content of existing websites  
iv. Create and update re-usable code libraries to streamline WordPress development cycle  
v. Facilitate client WordPress training, site documentation and maintenance  
vi. Design interfaces and graphics for presentations and mobile-delivered applications

title: Web Developer (E Commerce)
description:
hr@insightmanpower.in

**Core Role (Primary Responsibility):**

Owns the technical health and performance (Shopify or headless CMS). Responsible for site speed, Core Web Vitals, schema markup, conversion rate optimisation, checkout experience, pixel/CAPI setup, and the build-your-own-bundle UX. Works closely with Performance Marketing Manager on tracking accuracy and with Content Writer on schema deployment.

**Key Responsibilities:**

· Manage and optimize the website performance and technical health (Shopify, Magento and other e-commerce platforms)

· Improve Core Web Vitals (LCP, CLS, INP) and overall page speed

· Implement and maintain schema markup (Product, FAQ, Review, Breadcrumb, etc.) for SEO and rich snippets

· Own conversion rate optimisation (CRO) initiatives (landing pages, PDP improvements, checkout UX)

· Optimize and enhance the checkout experience to reduce drop-offs and increase conversions

· Implement and maintain tracking systems (Meta Pixel, Google Tag, Conversion APIs, server-side tracking)

· Ensure data accuracy across analytics platforms (GA4, Meta, Google Ads) in collaboration with Performance Marketing Manager

· Build and optimize “Build Your Own Bundle” UX for product customization and upselling

· Work closely with the Content Writer to deploy SEO-friendly content and structured data

· Integrate third-party tools (payment gateways, apps, APIs, marketing tools)

· Monitor and fix bugs, performance issues, and technical SEO errors

· Stay updated with latest Shopify, headless commerce, and web performance trends

**Requirements:**

· 3–5 years of experience in web development, preferably in e-commerce

· Strong experience with Shopify (Liquid) and other e-commerce platforms.

· Proficiency in HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and backend basics (PHP/Node.js is a plus)

· Experience with Core Web Vitals optimization and performance tuning

· Hands-on experience with Google Tag Manager, GA4, Meta Pixel, Conversion API (CAPI)

· Understanding of technical SEO and schema markup implementation

· Experience with CRO and user experience optimization

· Familiarity with API integrations and third-party apps

· Strong debugging and problem-solving skills

**Nice to Have:**

· Experience with Shopify Plus or headless commerce architecture

· Knowledge of server-side tracking and attribution tools

· Experience working with UK & US e-commerce markets

· Familiarity with A/B testing tools (Google Optimize alternatives, VWO, etc.)

· Understanding of subscription models and bundle builders

Pay: ₹50,000.00 - ₹90,000.00 per month

Benefits:

* Provident Fund

Work Location: In person

title: Wordpress Developer

description:
**Job Summary:**

A project manager is responsible for the direction, coordination, implementation, execution, control, and completion of projects while remaining aligned with the strategy, commitments, and goals of the organization.

**Duties and Responsibilities**

* Developing new software applications according to the organization needs.
* Upgrading and optimizing existing software as the organization’s needs change.
* Coordinate internal resources and third parties/vendors for the flawless execution of multiple projects.
* Ensure that all projects are delivered on time, within scope, and within budget.
* Assist in the definition of project scope and objectives, involving all relevant internal stakeholders and ensuring technical feasibility.
* Ensure resource availability and allocation.
* Develop a detailed project plan to monitor and track progress.
* Report and escalate to management as needed.
* Establish and maintain relationships with third parties/vendors.
* Create and maintain comprehensive project documentation.
* Meet with clients to take detailed ordering briefs and clarify specific requirements of each project.
* Delegate project tasks based on junior staff members’ individual strengths, skill sets, and experience levels.
* Track project performance, specifically to analyse the successful completion of short- and long-term goals.
* Develop comprehensive project plans to be shared with clients as well as other staff members.
* Use and continually develop leadership skills.
* Perform other related duties as assigned.
* Develop spreadsheets, diagrams, and process maps to document needs based on existing software or future projects developed by internal teams or third-party vendors.

title: Web Designer/Developer
description:
Job Summary:  
We are seeking a creative and detail-oriented Web Designer to design engaging and user-friendly websites. The ideal candidate should have a strong understanding of visual design, user experience (UX), and modern web design trends.

Key Responsibilities

\* Design and develop website layouts, user interfaces, and visual elements  
\* Create wireframes, mockups, and prototypes  
\* Ensure websites are responsive and optimized for all devices  
\* Collaborate with developers, content creators, and marketing teams  
\* Maintain brand consistency across all web pages  
\* Optimize websites for speed and performance  
\* Stay updated with the latest design trends and tools

\* Proven experience as a Web Designer or similar role  
\* Proficiency in design tools such as Adobe Photoshop, Figma, or Adobe XD  
\* Basic knowledge of HTML, CSS, and JavaScript  
\* Strong portfolio showcasing design projects  
\* Understanding of UX/UI principles  
\* Attention to detail and creativity

\*Preferred Qualifications:\*

\* Experience with responsive and mobile-first design  
\* Familiarity with CMS platforms like WordPress  
\* Knowledge of SEO principles

\*Benefits (Optional)

\* Competitive salary  
\* Flexible working hours  
\* Remote work options  
\* Professional development

Job Types: Full-time, Fresher

Pay: ₹8,000.00 - ₹15,000.00 per month

Work Location: In person

title: Frontend Developer (React Js)
description:
Job Summary:

We are looking for a motivated Frontend Developer with 1 year of hands-on experience in React.js to join our development team. The ideal candidate should have a strong understanding of modern UI development, responsive design, and frontend best practices.

**Key Responsibilities:**

* Develop and maintain user-facing features using React.js
* Build reusable components and front-end libraries for future use
* Translate UI/UX designs into high-quality, responsive code
* Optimize applications for maximum speed and scalability
* Collaborate with backend developers and designers
* Debug and fix frontend issues across browsers and devices

**Required Skills:**

* Strong knowledge of **JavaScript (ES6+)**, HTML5, and CSS3
* Hands-on experience with **React.js** and its core principles
* Familiarity with **REST APIs** integration
* Experience with version control tools like **Git**
* Basic understanding of responsive design and cross-browser compatibility
* Knowledge of state management (Context API / Redux is a plus)

**Preferred Qualifications:**

* Experience with frontend build tools (Webpack, Vite)
* Familiarity with modern UI frameworks (Material UI, Bootstrap)
* Basic understanding of Agile/Scrum methodology

**Soft Skills:**

* Good problem-solving skills
* Strong communication and teamwork abilities
* Willingness to learn and adapt

Job Types: Full-time, Fresher

Pay: ₹8,000.00 - ₹15,000.00 per month

title: Frontend Developer I (React,Typescript)
description:
**About :**

Quartic is an industrial-AI start-up in the business of accelerating the adoption of Industry 4.0. In other words, we allow manufacturers to extract more value from their legacy infrastructure and build Smart Manufacturing Factories. We do this with our Smart Industry platform which puts power directly into the hands of subject matter experts (SMEs) and solves key challenges faced by process manufacturing industries when implementing digital transformation. Using Quartic Platform, the SMEs are able to create and deploy AI and IIoT applications to significantly increase productivity and operational performance without the need for proficiency in programming or data science. The Quartic Platform is used by Fortune 100 and 500 companies in pharmaceutical, food & beverage, CPG, and other industries for process optimization, predictive maintenance, and energy optimization applications.

**Job Responsibilities:**

* Develop and maintain advanced user interface components using
  **React**
  and modern JavaScript frameworks.
* Work closely with the AI and UX/UI designer to ensure technical feasibility and to integrate machine learning insights into the user experience.
* Optimize applications for maximum speed and scalability while ensuring application security.
* Employ industry and design best practices throughout the software development lifecycle.
* Collaborate with back-end developers and data scientists to create cohesive and supportive architectures.
* Contribute to the creation of reusable code and libraries for future use.
* Maintain updated knowledge of the development industry and any advancements in technology.
* Provide technical advice and support in the planning and execution of innovative AI application projects.

**Requirements:**

* Bachelor's degree in computer science, Engineering, or a related field.
* 1-3 years of professional experience with front-end development.
* Proficient understanding of web markup, including HTML5, CSS3, and server-side CSS pre-processing platforms, such as SASS or LESS.
* Strong understanding of React and its core principles.
* Familiarity with newer specifications of ECMAScript or TypeScript.
* Familiarity with RESTful APIs and modern authorization mechanisms, such as JSON Web Token.
* Comfortable with modern front-end build pipelines and tools.
* Experience with front-end development tools such as Babel, Webpack, NPM, etc.
* Strong problem-solving skills, with a creative and analytic mind.
* Excellent verbal and written communication skills.

**What We Offer**

* Flexible work environment (remote-friendly)
* Competitive compensation
* Strong engineering culture with focus on ownership and impact
* Opportunity to work on complex, real-world technical challenges

**About Us**
At Zensar, we’re
*“experience-led everything”*
. We are committed to conceptualizing, designing, engineering, marketing, and managing digital solutions and experiences for over 130 leading enterprises. We are a company driven by a bold purpose:
*Together, we shape experiences for better futures*
. Whether for our clients, our people, or the world around us, this belief powers everything we do. At the heart of our culture is
*ONE with Client*
- a set of four core values that reflect who we are and how we work:
*One Zensar, Nurturing, Empowering, and Client Focus*
.
  
  
Part of the $4.8 billion RPG Group, we’re a community of 10,000+ innovators across 30+ global locations, including Milpitas, Seattle, Princeton, Cape Town, London, Zurich, Singapore, and Mexico City. Explore Life at Zensar and join us to Grow. Own. Achieve. Learn. to be the best version of yourself.
  
  
We believe the best work happens when individuality is celebrated, growth is encouraged, and well-being is prioritized. We are an equal employment opportunity (EEO) and affirmative action employer, committed to creating an inclusive workplace. All qualified applicants will be considered without regard to race, creed, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, citizenship, age, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability, marital status, family medical leave status, or protected veteran status.

title: Front End Developer
description:
**You Will Work On**
We help many of our clients to build awesome end user facing applications on any screen - web, mobile or hybrid. You will have the opportunity to work on modern responsive user interfaces from conception to final product.
  
  
**Location:**
Pune/Remote
  
  
**Years of Exp:**
3-6 Years
  
  
**Description**
As a Senior Software Engineer at Icertis Solutions Private Limited, you will play a pivotal role in our Product Engineering department. Your expertise will be instrumental in developing and maintaining front-end applications, collaborating closely with backend developers, and optimizing performance. You will be responsible for writing clean, maintainable code, ensuring cross-browser compatibility, and staying updated with the latest UI/UX trends. Your work will directly impact the user experience and overall success of our products.
  
  
**Responsibilities**

* Develop and maintain front-end applications using React.js, Redux, TypeScript, and UI libraries like MUI or Ant Design.
* Implement efficient API integrations, focusing on RESTful and GraphQL APIs, and optimize performance.
* Collaborate with backend developers to ensure seamless communication between the UI and APIs.
* Write clean, modular, and reusable code, adhering to best practices and ensuring maintainability.
* Optimize applications for speed, scalability, and cross-browser compatibility, considering performance metrics.
* Participate in code reviews, provide constructive feedback, and contribute to a culture of continuous improvement.
* Stay updated with the latest UI/UX trends and front-end technologies, incorporating new tools and techniques.
* Utilize GitHub Copilot, ChatGPT, and VS Code for efficient development, enhancing productivity.
* Troubleshoot and debug issues, providing timely solutions and maintaining application stability.

**Requirements**
**Qualifications**

* 3+ years of experience in front-end development, with a strong portfolio demonstrating expertise.
* Proficiency in React.js, Redux, TypeScript, and UI libraries (MUI, Ant Design, etc.) is a must.
* Experience with build tools like Webpack and Vite, and a good understanding of state management (Redux, Zustand, React Context API).
* Strong knowledge of front-end security best practices, ensuring data integrity and user privacy.
* Familiarity with backend technologies (.NET, C#, Python) is an advantage, enabling better collaboration.
* Exposure to GenAI technologies and a willingness to explore and implement innovative solutions.
* Experience working with GitHub Copilot, ChatGPT, and VS Code, leveraging their capabilities efficiently.
* Excellent problem-solving skills, with a track record of delivering high-quality, robust code.
* Ability to work independently, manage tasks, and prioritize effectively in a fast-paced environment.
* Strong communication skills, both written and verbal, for effective collaboration with team members.

**Benefits**
**About Cognologix:**
Cognologix helps companies disrupt by reimagining their business models and innovate like a Startup. We are at the forefront of digital disruption and take a business first approach to help meet our client’s strategic goals.
  
  
We are web scale organization helping our clients to deliver their next generation of products on the internet

title: Front End Developer Intern
description:
Job Title: Front End Developer Intern

Company: Skillzenloop

Location: Remote

Job Type: Full-time Internship

Duration: 1–3 Months

Stipend: ₹19,000 per month

About Skillzenloop:

Skillzenloop is a growing skill development and training organization dedicated to bridging the gap between academic learning and industry requirements. We offer structured internship programs, real-world projects, and mentorship to help candidates build job-ready skills in data analytics, technology, and business domains.

Role Overview:

We are looking for a Front End Developer Intern who is passionate about building intuitive and responsive user interfaces. This role provides hands-on exposure to modern frontend development practices and real-world web projects.

Key Responsibilities:

\* Develop interactive UI components using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript

\* Implement responsive layouts aligned with design specifications

\* Improve page performance and loading speed

\* Integrate frontend with APIs and backend services

\* Identify and fix UI bugs and inconsistencies

\* Ensure compatibility across browsers and devices

\* Maintain structured and reusable code

Required Qualifications:

\* Currently pursuing or recently completed a degree in Computer Science, IT, or a related field

\* Strong knowledge of HTML, CSS, and JavaScript

\* Understanding of responsive design principles

\* Familiarity with Git or version control systems

\* Basic knowledge of frontend frameworks (React, Angular, or Vue) is a plus

\* Attention to detail and design understanding

\* Problem-solving and communication skills

\* Ability to work independently in a remote setup

Preferred Skills:

\* Experience with frontend projects or portfolio work

\* Familiarity with UI/UX concepts

\* Basic understanding of API integration

What You Will Gain:

\* Hands-on experience in frontend development

\* Exposure to real-world web projects

\* Mentorship from experienced developers

\* Opportunity to build a strong portfolio

\* Certificate of completion based on performance

Skillzenloop is an equal opportunity employer. We value diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all interns.

title: Frontend Developer
description:
**About Us:**

At
**MEAtec**
, we build advanced digital solutions for the battery industry, with a focus on
**Battery Passport**
and
**Battery Analytics**
platforms. We are a fast-growing team of engineers, designers, and innovators passionate about sustainability, traceability, and performance in the battery lifecycle. Join us to help shape the digital future of clean energy.

**Position Overview:**

We are looking for a skilled Frontend Developer to join our growing development team. You will play a key role in building intuitive, scalable, and high-performance web applications to support regulatory compliance, traceability, and analytics for battery systems. You’ll work closely with backend engineers, designers, and product owners in an agile setup.

**Key Responsibilities:**

* Develop and enhance the Battery Passport and Battery Analytics web platforms.
* Build responsive, accessible, and performant UIs using React, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, Ant Design and TypeScript.
* Collaborate with designers to implement user-friendly interfaces.
* Participate in end-to-end feature delivery: planning, coding, testing, and deployment.
* Work closely with backend developers, integrating REST APIs/WebSocket.
* Participate in code reviews, debugging, and performance tuning.
* Support CI/CD processes and deployments (Docker, Azure Pipelines, Nginx).
* Stay updated on frontend best practices, frameworks, and tooling.

**Qualifications:**

* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field.
* 1-3 years of hands-on experience in modern frontend development.
* Strong experience with React, Next.js, JavaScript/TypeScript, Tailwind CSS.
* Strong experience with state management libraries such as Context API, Redux, or Zustand, as well as testing and performance optimization techniques.
* Understanding of backend and database technologies such as Node.js, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, or Elasticsearch is a plus.
* Experience with deployment technologies like Docker, Nginx, CI/CD pipelines.
* Good command of English (spoken and written) for global team collaboration.
* Comfortable working in a fast-paced, agile, and collaborative environment.

**What We Offer:**

* Hands-on experience in a collaborative and fast-paced environment.
* Opportunities to work on impactful projects that drive innovation.
* Competitive salary and benefits package.
* Flexible working hours and a supportive team culture.
* Professional development and mentorship opportunities.

﻿Join us at MEATEC and be a part of shaping the future of battery sustainability!

title: Frontend Engineer (Remote)
description:
**About Joveo:**

Every company says they're "AI-first." We actually are. Joveo's recruitment

advertising platform processes millions of hiring decisions through machine

learning, real-time bidding, and predictive analytics — helping the world's

largest employers find the right people, faster and fairer. But we're not

done. Not even close.

**Role:**
Frontend Engineer

**Location:**
Remote

**Role Overview:**

We are hiring a Frontend Engineer to craft the user-facing experiences

that make Joveo's platform fast, accessible, and intuitive. You will work

at the intersection of engineering and design — turning complex data

and workflows into clean, performant interfaces used by enterprise clients globally.

**Key Responsibilities:**

- Build and maintain scalable UI components and frontend systems

- Implement pixel-accurate, responsive interfaces from design specifications

- Optimize Core Web Vitals, rendering performance, and accessibility (WCAG)

- Collaborate with backend teams to define and consume API contracts

- Write comprehensive tests for UI components and user interaction flows

- Contribute to and maintain a shared frontend design system

**Required Skills & Qualifications:**

- Strong proficiency in React or Next.js with TypeScript

- Deep understanding of HTML, CSS, and modern browser rendering behavior

- Experience with state management, data fetching, and client-side routing

- Familiarity with accessibility standards (WCAG 2.1 AA or above)

- Experience with frontend testing frameworks (Jest, Playwright, or Cypress)

- Strong eye for design quality and ability to collaborate closely with designers

**Equal Opportunity Employer:**

Joveo is an equal opportunity employer. We are committed to building an

inclusive workplace and welcome applications from all qualified individuals

regardless of race, color, ethnicity, nationality, gender, gender identity

or expression, sexual orientation, age, religion, disability, marital status,

or any other characteristic protected by applicable law. All hiring decisions

are made solely on the basis of qualifications, skills, and demonstrated

ability.

**If your dream job is one that doesn't fit neatly into a job title — apply.**

**Joveo. Where AI meets the future of work.**

title: Frontend Engineer I
description:
**About Joveo**

As the global leader in AI-powered, high-performance recruitment marketing, Joveo is transforming talent attraction and recruitment media buying for the world’s largest employers, staffing firms, RPOs, and media agencies. The Joveo platform enables businesses to attract, source, engage, and hire the best candidates on time and within budget.

Backed by marquee investors like Nexus Ventures Partners, Joveo has been featured in Inc. Magazine’s List of America’s Fastest-Growing Private Companies for three years in a row.

Powering millions of jobs every day, Joveo’s data-driven recruitment marketing platform uses advanced data science and machine learning to dynamically manage and optimize talent sourcing and applications across all online channels while providing real-time insights at every step of the job seeker journey, from click to hire.

For more information about Joveo’s award-winning platform, visit
www.joveo.com

**About Job**

**Role: Software Development Engineer I (Frontend)**

Joveo is looking for a passionate Software Development Engineer I (Frontend) to join our dynamic, expanding Engineering team in Hyderabad. Modern JavaScript and React are at the core of Joveo’s product development, and we leverage modern frontend tooling to build intuitive, high-performance user interfaces.

As an SDE I, you will focus on writing clean, maintainable, and efficient code using modern React principles. You will collaborate closely with senior engineers, designers, and product teams to bring user-facing features to life. This role is a fantastic opportunity to accelerate your career, build a strong technical foundation, and help us push the boundaries of web applications.

**Requirements:**

* 0–2 years of experience in front-end development (this can include strong internships or a robust portfolio of personal projects).
* Modern React Focus: Solid foundation in React.js and component-driven architecture. You should be highly comfortable with functional components, state management, and modern React patterns.
* Modern Tooling: Familiarity with current frontend build tools and ecosystems (moving beyond legacy setups).
* Core Web Tech: Strong skills in HTML5, CSS3, and modern JavaScript (ES6+), with the ability to build responsive UIs.
* Performance Mindset: A basic understanding of web delivery, browser rendering, and frontend optimization techniques.
* Team Player: Great communication skills, an eagerness to learn, and the ability to work collaboratively in a fast-paced environment.
* Problem Solver: Excellent analytical skills with a proactive approach to tackling technical challenges.
* Bonus Points: Contributions to open-source projects, an active GitHub profile, or deployed personal React applications.
